title: hydrangea opuloides var. prolifera
intro: Hydrangea opuloides var. prolifera, also known as Bigleaf Mountain Hydrangea, is a perennial shrub native to East Asia and is characterized by its large, showy white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its anthraquinone and flavonoid content. The health benefits of Hydrangea opuloides var. prolifera include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against cell damage. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, with herbal preparations also including the use of dried roots and flowers in traditional Chinese medicine and modern herbal remedies.
